notes: All nine responses correctly identify the macro scene (crowded sunny beach, sea with boats, Where's Wally style) but none locate any hidden characters (Waldo/Odlaw/Wizard Whitebeard) and none name the distinctive watercraft (hovercraft, submarine, dinghy, waterskier) or the Punch & Judy booth. Hallucination density rises with temperature: t0.1 responses stay closer to verifiable content, t0.4|rep1 is the clear outlier with a fabricated horse-drawn carriage (explicitly contradicted by ground truth) plus a long list of invented micro-activities, and the t0.7 responses introduce invented animals (cats, chicken) and instruments. Every response is truncated mid-sentence except t0.4|rep2.
